title: Repealed
doc_html:
Art. 345. Repealed by Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.

            Acts 1993, No. 834, §1, eff. June 22, 1993; Acts 1999, No. 325, §1; Acts 1999, No. 759, §1; Acts 1999, No. 1054, §1; Acts 2001, No. 1218, §1; Acts 2004, No. 374, §1; Acts 2006, No. 466, §2, eff. June 15, 2006; Acts 2010, No. 709, §1; Acts 2010, No. 914, §1; Acts 2016, No. 613, §4, eff. Jan. 1, 2017.
